# Minesweeper Game Application

An accessible, high-performance web implementation of the classic Minesweeper puzzle game built using React, Vite, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It features custom difficulty adjustments and a state-rollback system.

## Component Architecture

- **Home Component (`/src/pages/Home.tsx`):** Coordinates the main game loop, manages recursive board disclosure routines, and hosts game state updates.
- **Tile Component (`/src/components/TileComponent.tsx`):** Renders individual target fields handles click mechanics and updates cell flags.

## State Management Architecture

- **Lazy Mine Generation:** Delays mine mapping until the user triggers the first tile click, guaranteeing a bomb-free starting position.
- **Undo Capability:** Implements an array-based stack tracking the previous 10 board turns for immediate board reversion.
- **Dynamic CSS Grids:** Leverages responsive CSS variables inside Tailwind configurations to instantly scale grid allocations based on board density settings.
